description: Stat-specific calibration multipliers based on v17 cache validation. v1.2: corrected PR/GOBLIN, RA/GOBLIN, PA/GOBLIN from second-pass no-direction-filter analysis.

PR.note: Points+Rebounds — v1.2 GOBLIN corrected from 1.095 (was over-predicted -4.5%)

RA.note: Rebounds+Assists — v1.2 GOBLIN corrected from 0.997 (was over-predicted -6.3%)

PTS.note: Points — STANDARD corrected from 0.94 (+5.5% gap fixed)

PA.note: Points+Assists — v1.2 GOBLIN corrected from 1.049 (was over-predicted -4.3%)

default_adjustments.note: Fallback multipliers for stats not explicitly listed
